assessment_summary: Reviewed 5 L-sized issues for splitting potential. BC-06-C2 requires splitting due to distinct desktop vs mobile layout concerns. BC-07-C1 requires splitting due to multiple independent chart concerns. BC-05-C1, BC-05-C2, and BC-07-C2 should remain unsplit as each represents a cohesive, implementable scope.

items.original_title: Pipeline view: Design Phase horizontal stage flow with job cards
items.rationale: Complex layout but unified concept. Horizontal stage flow with 8 Design stages can be implemented and reviewed in one PR. Pulsing animation is already separated into BC-05-C3. No multiple distinct components warrant separate PRs.

items.original_title: Pipeline view: Build Phase horizontal stage flow with job cards
items.rationale: Mirrors BC-05-C1 structure and scope. Reuses JobCard component. Single PR can implement the Build Phase section with same pattern/structure as Design Phase. No blocking dependencies between the two phases.

items.original_title: Completed view: full job detail overlay with two-column stage breakdown and artifact viewer
items.rationale: Merges three distinct concerns: (1) desktop two-column layout with accordion, (2) mobile tab layout variant, and (3) lazy artifact fetching with loading states. Desktop and mobile layouts are sufficiently different to warrant separate PRs. Artifact loading logic can be developed and tested independently.

children.title: Completed view: detail overlay desktop layout with accordion and artifact rendering
scope: Full-screen overlay container with accessible close button
Two-column desktop layout (Design stages left, Build stages right)
Expandable accordion sections per stage with agent details
Lazy artifact fetch triggered on expand via BC-01-C2
Rendered artifact markdown with react-markdown and syntax highlighting
Summary footer row with cost/duration/token totals
Accessible focus trap and keyboard navigation

children.title: Completed view: detail overlay mobile tab layout variant
scope: Tab interface for mobile (Design | Build tabs)
Single-column layout below tab bar
Same accordion structure as desktop but stacked vertically
Reuse artifact rendering from BC-06-C2a
Responsive tab indicator and navigation
Functional at 375px viewport

items.original_title: Analytics view: cost dashboard with time-series and breakdown charts
items.rationale: Combines four distinct chart types with different aggregation logic: time-series with granularity toggle (one concern) vs breakdown charts by project/agent/model (separate concern). Time-series and toggles can be built independently from breakdown analysis. Different data aggregation strategies merit separate implementation and review.

children.title: Analytics view: cost time-series chart with granularity toggle
scope: Daily/weekly/monthly premium request consumption time-series chart
Time granularity toggle switching chart view
Data aggregation logic for each granularity (daily, weekly, monthly)
Clear zero/empty state when no cost data
Responsive at 375px mobile
Use recharts or equivalent lightweight charting library

children.title: Analytics view: cost breakdown charts (project, agent, model tier)
scope: Cost per project bar chart
Cost per agent bar chart
Cost per model tier (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) breakdown chart
Data aggregation from stage-level premiumRequests
Sorting and labeling strategy
Clear empty/zero state when no cost data
Responsive at 375px mobile

items.original_title: Analytics view: performance dashboard with agent durations and success rates
items.rationale: Cohesive performance analysis dashboard with four related chart types sharing the same data source (execution-log stage durations). Charts analyze different performance aspects but work together as a unified dashboard view. Can be implemented and reviewed in one PR.
